source.description: Built-in image generation contact sheet reviewed before cropping; approved panel 6 is saved as the finished raster artwork.
source.notes: The earlier v1 master-derived assets are preserved, but the public lesson should use the contact-sheet crop sequence after this backfill.

process_strategy: Use one approved six-panel contact sheet that builds the kite from diamond/spars to panel seams, string/bows, wind marks, color, and final keeper-line strength.

final_elements.name: diamond kite body
final_elements.description: The tall diamond outline that makes the kite silhouette.

final_elements.name: center and cross spars
final_elements.description: The vertical and horizontal support lines inside the kite.

final_elements.name: patchwork panel seams
final_elements.description: The extra diagonal, vertical, and horizontal seams dividing the kite into fabric patches.

final_elements.name: curving kite string
final_elements.description: The loose S-curve string hanging from the bottom point.

final_elements.name: three bow ties
final_elements.description: The three small bow shapes attached along the lower string.

final_elements.name: wind swirls and clouds
final_elements.description: The light breeze lines and small clouds surrounding the kite.

final_elements.name: colored kite patches
final_elements.description: The red, teal, blue, yellow, striped, and dotted colored-pencil fabric panels.

final_elements.name: colored tail bows
final_elements.description: The red, blue, and yellow colored-pencil bow ties on the tail.

frames.visible_job: Reveals the kite's diamond outline plus the vertical and horizontal support lines before adding small panels.
Adds the extra seam lines that turn the simple diamond into patchwork fabric sections.
Adds the curving string below the kite and three small bow outlines along it.
Adds light wind swirls and small clouds around the kite without moving the kite body.
Adds the red, teal, blue, yellow, striped, and dotted kite patches plus the colored tail bows.

final_step.visible_job: Strengthens the kite outline, seams, bow knots, wind lines, clouds, and colored-pencil texture without changing the drawing.
allowed_changes: paper texture from the saved contact sheet

rejection_checks: No panel, string, bow, wind swirl, cloud, or core color choice should first appear in the final image.
The kite must keep the same centered diamond pose and curving tail in every frame.
The bow colors must not appear before the color step.
Do not use separately prompted step images that drift from this approved contact sheet.
